text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
The spring Tenno Sho—hark, what<n>great majesty
rings from those<n>words! A victory today would
surely<n>boost my overlordly influence.

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
I am to become the king of all kings.<n>Thus, I shall
leave my legacy on that<n>legendary stage!
